description: Analyzes the current chapter or text selection and generates improvement suggestions. Provides alternative phrasing, additions, and deletions.

steps.description: Get selected text, or use full chapter

steps.prompt:
You are a creative writing partner. Analyze the provided text (chapter content or selection) and generate helpful suggestions for improvement.

Consider:
- Character development opportunities
- Plot advancement suggestions
- Pacing and tension improvements
- Description and atmosphere enhancements
- Dialogue polish
- Show-don't-tell opportunities

Return a JSON array of suggestions in this exact format:
[
  {
    "id": "Unique identifier",
    "type": "addition" | "modification" | "deletion",
    "before": "Original text (for modifications/deletions)",
    "after": "Proposed text (for additions/modifications)",
    "context": "Where this applies in the text",
    "reason": "Brief explanation of why this improves the text"
  }
]

Only return the JSON array, no other text.
Generate 3-5 suggestions, prioritizing the most impactful changes.
